name: Graph Traversal Problem Set
description: Implement BFS and DFS on an undirected graph. Include time complexity analysis for each approach.

name: Midterm Exam — Binary Trees
description: In-class midterm covering binary trees, BSTs, AVL trees, and heaps.

name: Dynamic Programming Assignment
description: Solve 4 classic DP problems: Knapsack, LCS, Edit Distance, and Coin Change. Include memoization and bottom-up solutions.

name: Matrix Operations Quiz
description: Short quiz on matrix multiplication, transposition, and determinants.

name: Eigenvalues and Eigenvectors Homework
description: Problems 4.1–4.6 from the textbook covering eigenvalue decomposition and characteristic polynomials.

name: Final Project — Applications of Linear Algebra
description: Research paper or implementation project applying linear algebra to a real-world domain (image compression, ML, network analysis, etc.).

name: Technical Proposal Draft
description: First draft of your technical proposal. Should include problem statement, proposed solution, timeline, and audience analysis.

name: Peer Review Submission
description: Provide structured peer feedback for two classmates' technical proposals using the provided rubric.
